notes: Solid structure with helmet, rate limiting, CORS, and multer file filtering. However: no authentication/authorization on any endpoint (upload/delete wide open), no magic byte validation (only extension+mimetype check, easily spoofed), CORS defaults to wildcard with credentials:true (invalid combo), no cleanup of original file if thumbnail generation fails, no timeout on sharp processing, in-memory metadata lost on restart, no UUID format validation on :id params, no graceful shutdown, DRY violation on thumbnailPath.replace repeated twice, mixed sync/async fs usage. Above average but not production-ready without auth and proper file content validation.
